title: Use svg for pkginstaller banner
body:
On external monitors with different resolutions, our pkginstaller logo renders poorly. Using vector graphics solves this problem.

Before: 
![Screenshot 2025-03-06 at 14 32 51](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2aaef693-40bc-4226-a14a-53d6f1a60176)

After: 
![Screenshot 2025-03-06 at 14 52 52](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0fdf49ae-3a4a-40d3-8710-5279fbca3036)

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/25475

If anyone would like to try this out, you can find a built version [here](https://github.com/ashley-cui/podman-actions-test/releases/download/v5.5.0-dev/podman-installer-macos-svg.pkg). It's unsigned though so you may need to approve it in your privacy & security settings. cc @vrothberg
